summary: The Quartz Productization thread is converging. Three signals — rising project relevance, the Q1 scope pivot, and advisor input — point to a viable productization window around 2026-06-10.

forecasts.title: Productization window opens
forecasts.detail: Bounded pilot could capture the synthetic revenue stream before momentum decays.

forecasts.title: Knowledge base drift
forecasts.detail: One node is overdue for review; left unattended it lowers average signal quality.

forecasts.title: Atlas reuse
forecasts.detail: Liminal Atlas work in Project Atlas could feed back into Quartz exploration.

knowledge_evolution.emerging_bridge: Generative Metaphors now bridges Project Atlas and the Liminal Atlas concept.
decay_alerts: Sample Person B due for review

boardroom_synthesis: Strategist favors productization on the strongest revenue signal; Skeptic flags novelty risk and recommends a bounded pilot first; Operator confirms the scope pivot freed capacity. Resolved: proceed to a bounded pilot, escalate after the 06-10 checkpoint.

actions.text: Draft a one-page synthetic offer for Quartz Productization
Triage the research item on graph-memory systems
Run lifecycle review on Sample Person B
